# Citation Finder Ai MCP

> MEOK AI Labs — Find and format academic citations

`citation-finder-ai-mcp` is a Model Context Protocol (MCP) server by MEOK AI Labs.

## Install

```bash
pip install citation-finder-ai-mcp
```

Or run without installing:

```bash
uvx citation-finder-ai-mcp
```

## Tools

- `find_citations` — Search for academic citations by topic, title, or author. Returns structured results for further formatting.
- `format_citation` — Format a citation in the specified style (apa, mla, chicago, bibtex, harvard).
- `check_doi` — Validate a DOI format and return its resolution URL and metadata lookup link.
- `generate_bibliography` — Generate a formatted bibliography from a JSON array of citation objects. Each object needs: title, authors, year.

## Links

- Source: https://github.com/CSOAI-ORG/citation-finder-ai-mcp
- PyPI: https://pypi.org/project/citation-finder-ai-mcp/
- MEOK AI Labs: https://meok.ai
- Council of AI: https://councilof.ai
